description_long: This is a set of three modern, boxy houses with flat roofs, each featuring large rectangular windows and clean, white facades. The houses are arranged side by side, each with a distinct entry door, and some have small fenced yards or patios at the rear. The front facades are characterized by prominent bay windows and minimalistic design, while the rear sides include private outdoor spaces enclosed by wooden or white fences. The windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light to the interiors, and the doors are simple and modern. The houses are set on a paved base, suggesting integration with urban sidewalks or driveways. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor areas.
description: A trio of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, white facades, and private fenced yards, arranged side by side in a clean, urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing three houses with bay windows, individual entry doors, and minimalistic facades.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting large rear windows and fenced private yards or patios.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facades, fenced yards, and a mix of window sizes and placements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the side profiles of the houses, with some visible outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple modern entry doors with minimal steps, no porch, and clean lines
